indexdef: CREATE INDEX email_processing_events_email_idx ON public.email_processing_events USING btree (email_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX email_processing_events_pkey ON public.email_processing_events USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX email_processing_events_workspace_idx ON public.email_processing_events USING btree (workspace_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX email_processing_snapshots_pkey ON public.email_processing_snapshots USING btree (email_id, workspace_id)
CREATE INDEX email_processing_snapshots_workspace_idx ON public.email_processing_snapshots USING btree (workspace_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX knowledge_chunks_pkey ON public.knowledge_chunks USING btree (id, workspace_id)
CREATE INDEX knowledge_chunks_tags_idx ON public.knowledge_chunks USING gin (tags)
CREATE INDEX knowledge_chunks_workspace_idx ON public.knowledge_chunks USING btree (workspace_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX processed_emails_pkey ON public.processed_emails USING btree (email_id, workspace_id)
CREATE INDEX processed_emails_workspace_idx ON public.processed_emails USING btree (workspace_id)
